classes.name: pptx2md.types.ConversionConfig

class_variables.name: pptx2md.types.ConversionConfig.pptx_path
documentation: Path to the pptx file to be converted

class_variables.name: pptx2md.types.ConversionConfig.output_path
documentation: Path of the output file

class_variables.name: pptx2md.types.ConversionConfig.image_dir
documentation: Where to put images extracted

class_variables.name: pptx2md.types.ConversionConfig.title_path
documentation: Path to the custom title list file

class_variables.name: pptx2md.types.ConversionConfig.image_width
documentation: Maximum image width in px

class_variables.name: pptx2md.types.ConversionConfig.disable_image
documentation: Disable image extraction

class_variables.name: pptx2md.types.ConversionConfig.disable_wmf
documentation: Keep wmf formatted image untouched (avoid exceptions under linux)

class_variables.name: pptx2md.types.ConversionConfig.disable_color
documentation: Do not add color HTML tags

class_variables.name: pptx2md.types.ConversionConfig.disable_escaping
documentation: Do not attempt to escape special characters

class_variables.name: pptx2md.types.ConversionConfig.disable_notes
documentation: Do not add presenter notes

class_variables.name: pptx2md.types.ConversionConfig.enable_slides
documentation:
Deliniate slides with `
---
`

class_variables.name: pptx2md.types.ConversionConfig.is_wiki
documentation: Generate output as wikitext (TiddlyWiki)

class_variables.name: pptx2md.types.ConversionConfig.is_mdk
documentation: Generate output as madoko markdown

class_variables.name: pptx2md.types.ConversionConfig.is_qmd
documentation: Generate output as quarto markdown presentation

class_variables.name: pptx2md.types.ConversionConfig.min_block_size
documentation: The minimum character number of a text block to be converted

class_variables.name: pptx2md.types.ConversionConfig.page
documentation: Only convert the specified page

class_variables.name: pptx2md.types.ConversionConfig.custom_titles
documentation: Mapping of custom titles to their heading levels

class_variables.name: pptx2md.types.ConversionConfig.try_multi_column
documentation: Try to detect multi-column slides

class_variables.name: pptx2md.types.ConversionConfig.keep_similar_titles
documentation: Keep similar titles (allow for repeated slide titles - One or more - Add (cont.) to the title)
Configuration for PowerPoint to Markdown conversion.

class_variables.name: pptx2md.types.ImageElement.original_ext
documentation: For tracking original file extension (e.g. wmf)

class_variables.name: pptx2md.types.ImageElement.alt_text
documentation: For accessibility

class_variables.name: pptx2md.types.TableElement.content
documentation: rows -> cols -> rich text

methods.name: pptx2md.outputter.MarkdownFormatter.__init__

methods.name: pptx2md.outputter.WikiFormatter.__init__
documentation: write outputs to wikitext

methods.name: pptx2md.outputter.MadokoFormatter.__init__
documentation: write outputs to madoko markdown

documentation: write outputs to quarto markdown - reveal js
